---
id: handle-get-org-tags
title: "Get organization tags"
description: "Returns all tags for the authenticated user's organization with usage counts, sorted by count desc then name asc"

  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/tags"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all tags for the authenticated user's organization with usage counts, sorted by count desc then name asc
